evals.prompt: 陌生 Isaac mod 的被动道具想让玩家发射的泪弹有概率分裂一次。没有给回调、道具 id、概率、伤害或资源。写实现前的发现项与投射物合同。
evals.expected_output: Requires project discovery, leaves design values TBD, selects a fired-shot route, requires an owned marker and child recursion policy, and separates collision/remove settlement.

evals.prompt: 我在 MC_POST_TEAR_UPDATE 里看到蓝色泪弹就改速度和伤害，所有 mod 都应该一样吧？
evals.expected_output: Rejects shared variant as ownership proof and requires creation-time marker or verified mechanic/source evidence; preserves foreign and vanilla tears.

evals.prompt: 使魔发射一颗自定义泪弹，命中同一敌人只触发一次雷击，泪弹死亡时也会落雷。
evals.expected_output: Requires familiar and projectile ownership proof, source credit, a per-projectile hit/settlement boundary that prevents collision plus death double-triggering, and explicit child/lifetime rules.

evals.prompt: 自定义 laser variant 查不到时就用 10 继续 Spawn，之后全局扫描 laser 删除错误的。
evals.expected_output: Rejects raw fallback and global cleanup; requires current-project registration/lookup proof and suppresses only the owned spawn when unresolved.

evals.prompt: Boss 要朝玩家连续发射追踪弹幕，顺便让玩家的泪弹反射。
evals.expected_output: Routes Boss projectile phase/pattern to isaac-npc-boss-ai and player-tear reflection to isaac-projectile-combat, keeping source/ownership and collision contracts separate.
